preview.summary: The defining Group K fixture sees Colombia's dynamic attack take on a technically gifted Portugal side built around an elite midfield. Likely a battle for top spot, the match pits Luis Diaz's directness against Portugal's possession control. Both sides have the quality to win the group, making this a genuine heavyweight clash.
preview.homeForm: Colombia are ranked around 13th and qualified comfortably from South America with a strong attack.
preview.awayForm: Portugal sit fifth in the world, blending elite midfield control with attacking depth.
preview.homeKey: Luis Diaz, direct winger who creates separation one-on-one.
preview.awayKey: Bruno Fernandes, creative hub orchestrating Portugal's midfield.
storylines: Group K likely decided in this Miami showdown
Diaz versus Portugal's back line is a marquee duel
Portugal's depth tested by Colombia's attacking talent
preview.h2h: This is a rare meeting between the nations, with no prior World Cup encounter.
